title: ECHS Visakhapatnam – Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Dental – 5 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ECHS Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS Visakhapatnam) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Contractual Employees. Candidates with MBBS, MD/MS, Diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through ECHS Visakhapatnam official website echs.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: Max Age for Employment: 66, 68, 56 years. Max Age for Contractual Service: 68, 70, 58 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, MD/MS in Speciality concerned/ DNB, Diploma Holder in Dental H/T/A or Class 1 Dental H/T/A DORA Course (Armed Forces)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Medical Officer - 01
